firstTimeGate.title: Get Protected
firstTimeGate.description: Choose a plan to activate your income protection. RideShield watches for disruptions in your zone and automatically processes claims — zero paperwork.

expiredGate.title: Your coverage expired
expiredGate.description: Your protection is no longer active. Renew to keep your income shielded from disruptions.
expiredGate.renew_success: Coverage renewed! It will activate after the waiting period.

purchase.success: Policy purchased! It will activate after the waiting period.

hero.greeting: {{name}}, your protection runs in the background.
hero.description: RideShield watches disruption signals in your zone, merges overlapping triggers into one incident, checks policy coverage, and decides payout without asking you to file a manual claim.

decisionPanel.reason_idle: RideShield is monitoring your zone and will create a claim automatically if a covered incident is verified.

decisionPanel.heading_delayed: Your latest claim is waiting for a manual check.
decisionPanel.heading_approved: Your latest decision is already approved.

coverage.no_policy_desc: Register or buy a plan to activate protection.
coverage.activation_in: Activation in {{hours}} hours unless demo force-activation is used.

disruptionFeed.title: Active incidents
disruptionFeed.desc: RideShield watches signal clusters in the background, merges overlapping triggers into one incident, and turns that incident into an explainable claim path.
disruptionFeed.merge_note: Threshold breaches in the same zone and time window were merged into one incident so the worker experiences one coherent claim story instead of duplicate event noise.

coverageOutlook.subtitle: Current disruption outlook
coverageOutlook.tracking: RideShield keeps tracking this outlook as new disruption signals arrive.
coverageOutlook.empty_signals: Detailed signal contributions are not available for this view yet.

historyList.empty: No claims found for this view.

trustScore.fraud: Fraud: Used to protect payout integrity

claim.pick: Pick a claim incident from the list to view detailed information.
claim.no_elevated: No elevated review checks on this claim.

appFrame.alert_success: Dispatcher alerted. They will contact you shortly.

0.title: Zero-Touch Claims
0.description: Detection, not filing. We monitor disruption signals in the background so you never have to fill a form.

1.title: Signal Intelligence
1.description: We merge noisy environmental data into one clear incident story, ensuring accurate and explainable outcomes.

2.title: Visible Outcomes
2.description: Transparent payout paths. See the logic behind every decision and get settled instantly.

hero.description_guest: The safety net for the gig economy. Instant payouts. Zero paperwork. Always watching your back.
hero.description_worker: Your coverage is live. Review your incident history and recent payouts in one calm place.
hero.subtitle: Shielding your earnings since day one.

system.title: The Lifecycle of a Claim.
system.description: RideShield observes disruption signals, translates them into one clear incident, and settles payouts instantly.

worker.label: Worker surface
worker.desc: Coverage, incidents, payout history, and decision explanations in one calm, readable view.

admin.label: Admin surface
admin.desc: Review queue, disruption pressure, fraud visibility, scheduler health, and city-aware monitoring.

core.title: How the backend becomes a visible product
core.description: The frontend does not mock product logic. It makes the real engine legible so workers trust outcomes and admins understand why those outcomes happened.

auth.title: Sign in to RideShield
auth.subtitle: Worker and admin sessions are separate for clean protection flows.

worker.info_hint: After login, workers see their active protection, claim status, and payout history.

admin.info_hint: Admins access the operational control surface: review queue, incident pressure, and demo controls.

sidebar.label: Why RideShield
sidebar.headline: Income protection that feels automatic, not bureaucratic.
sidebar.p1: Workers do not file claims manually. RideShield monitors zone-level disruptions, matches active policies, and pays automatically when confidence is high.
sidebar.p2: Admins see the pressure points behind the engine: delayed reviews, duplicate prevention, payout movement, and scheduler status.
sidebar.p3: The product is built to explain outcomes clearly so approved, delayed, and rejected claims never feel arbitrary.

errors.phone_invalid: Use a valid worker phone number.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

header.title: Register a delivery worker and buy a policy
header.desc: This flow uses the real worker registration and policy purchase APIs. Admin-only simulation actions stay outside the worker signup flow.

errors.locations: Worker geography could not be loaded. Retry to continue onboarding.

errors.plan_catalog: Detailed premium pricing could not be loaded.

errors.fix_fields: Fix the highlighted registration fields first.
errors.register_success: Worker registered. Choose a policy next.

basic_protect.bestFor: A low-cost safety net for riders who mainly want outage protection and a predictable weekly premium.

smart_protect.bestFor: The default choice for most active riders who want weather, traffic, and outage protection together.

assured_plan.bestFor: Broader trigger cover with a guaranteed minimum payout floor when conditions turn rough.

pro_max.bestFor: The highest-cap option for full-time riders who want predictive alerts and the fastest payout path.

onboarding.recommendation_reason: Best balance of cost and coverage for your risk level

complete.title: You're now protected
complete.desc: Your income protection is active and monitoring for disruptions.
complete.footer: We'll automatically detect disruptions and handle claims for you.

form.name: Full name
form.consent: Worker consents to location, behavior, and device data being used for claim validation and fraud checks.

compare.title: Pick protection in one glance
compare.desc: Three curated options. Weekly pricing already reflects the rider's live risk score, so you only need to compare cost, cap, and fit.

plans.waiting: Policy options will appear as soon as pricing finishes loading.

more.title: Need a different coverage shape?
more.desc: The short list keeps the decision fast, but the full backend catalog is still available when a rider wants a different cap or payout profile.
more.footer: RideShield is highlighting the quickest three-way choice first. Open the extra option list if this rider needs a different premium-to-coverage tradeoff.

trust.title: Why this feels safer to buy
trust.monitoring_desc: Weather, traffic, AQI, and outage thresholds are tracked automatically.
trust.decision_desc: Straightforward claims can auto-decide; suspicious ones route to manual review.
trust.activation_desc: Coverage stays pending until the waiting period ends or simulation activates it.

next.title: What happens next
next.step_1_desc: Lock in the selected weekly premium and coverage cap.
next.step_2_desc: The policy stays pending until the wait window ends or an admin activates simulation coverage.
next.step_3_desc: The worker dashboard shows the active policy, live incidents, and claim outcomes.

howItWorks.hero_desc: Inputs become incidents. Incidents become decisions. Decisions become payouts. All in one smooth, visible journey.
howItWorks.promise_text: You should be on the road earning, not filling out insurance paperwork. We pay you automatically when bad conditions hit.
howItWorks.diff_text: Guaranteed payouts, zero paperwork, no hidden clauses.

workerFlow.title: From coverage purchase to payout
workerFlow.desc: This is the actual sequence RideShield is built around. Each step should feel like something is happening.
workerFlow.step1_body: Worker registers, selects a city and zone, and buys weekly cover linked to the right disruption classes.
workerFlow.step2_body: RideShield monitors weather, AQI, traffic, platform, and civic signals in that worker's operating zone.
workerFlow.step3_body: When severe weather or network outages hit your zone, our system verifies it instantly and automatically files an approved claim on your behalf.
workerFlow.step4_body: Coverage, confidence, trust, and fraud pressure determine whether the claim is approved, delayed, or rejected.
workerFlow.step5_body: Approved claims turn into payout records immediately in simulation mode, with the reasoning still visible in the UI.

policyEngine.title: Clear, Transparent Coverage
policyEngine.desc: No hidden clauses or complex fine print. Understand exactly how your weekly policy protects your earnings.
policyEngine.weekly_cover_detail: Policies are bought weekly, with coverage caps and trigger coverage tied to the selected plan.
policyEngine.trigger_aware_detail: Covers heavy rain, extreme heat, severe traffic, and delivery app outages.
policyEngine.waiting_period_detail: To keep coverage affordable for everyone, policies activate 24 hours after purchase.
policyEngine.zone_logic_detail: Coverage and triggering are tied to city and zone records, not just a generic global rule.

systemLayers.title: How the backend becomes a trusted product
systemLayers.desc: The external inputs are simulated for demo use, but the core engine is real and the decisions are exposed in the UI.
systemLayers.trigger_engine_detail: Mocked external feeds supply weather, AQI, traffic, platform, and civic signals. The trigger engine applies real thresholds and zone-aware profiles to decide when an incident exists.
systemLayers.claim_processor_detail: Claims are not filed by workers. RideShield identifies active covered workers in the affected zone and creates one claim per worker per incident window.
systemLayers.decision_engine_detail: Disruption strength, event confidence, fraud score, and trust score are combined into an explainable approval, delay, or rejection path.
systemLayers.payout_executor_detail: Approved claims are turned into payout records immediately in simulation mode so the worker and admin surfaces show the outcome end to end.

notification.title: Severe Flooding verified
notification.body: Zone 2 disruption triggered. No action needed on your end.

whatsapp.tooltip: Need help? Message us on WhatsApp
